recovery_reason: single operational recovery after manifest adapter-path pointer repair; original failure was before generation/evaluator/canonical outputs
command_executed: ssh gpu-4090 'cd /home/TJK/DEE/sage-dee && TS=$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ) && RUN_ROOT=/data/TJK/DEE/sage-dee/runs/phase13_final_test_seed42_recovery_${TS} && LOG_ROOT=/data/TJK/DEE/sage-dee/runs/phase13_recovery_logs/phase13_final_test_seed42_${TS} && ADAPTER=/data/TJK/DEE/sage-dee/runs/phase6_S4_seed42_20260504T052553Z/train/artifacts/model/adapter && test ! -e "${RUN_ROOT}" && test -d "${ADAPTER}" && mkdir -p "${LOG_ROOT}" && { PATH=/home/TJK/.conda/envs/tjk-feg/bin:$PATH /home/TJK/.conda/envs/tjk-feg/bin/python scripts/v2/run_phase13_final_test_once.py --config configs/v2/sage_v2_phase11_docfee_stress.yaml --manifest docs/refactor/SAGE_V2_FINAL_FREEZE_MANIFEST.json --dataset DuEE-Fin-dev500 --split test --seed 42 --profile phase11_s4_role_safe_surface_memory --phase6-runs-root /data/TJK/DEE/sage-dee/runs --adapter-path "${ADAPTER}" --evaluator-root /home/TJK/DEE/dee-eval --benchmark-root /data/TJK/DEE/data/processed --out-dir "${RUN_ROOT}" --allow-human-authorized-operational-recovery > >(tee "${LOG_ROOT}/phase13_recovery.stdout.log") 2> >(tee "${LOG_ROOT}/phase13_recovery.stderr.log" >&2); rc=$?; echo "phase13_recovery_returncode=${rc}" | tee "${LOG_ROOT}/phase13_recovery.returncode"; echo "RUN_ROOT=${RUN_ROOT}" | tee "${LOG_ROOT}/phase13_recovery.run_root"; echo "LOG_ROOT=${LOG_ROOT}" | tee "${LOG_ROOT}/phase13_recovery.log_root"; exit ${rc}; }'
